description: Compound fixture stacking four anti-patterns: (1) no top-level `permissions:` block, (2) `actions/checkout@v4` pinned by tag not SHA, (3) a `curl ... | sh` step, (4) `${{ github.event.* }}` interpolated into a shell command. Four findings, each concept once (no double-fire): gha-default-permissions-read, gha-pin-actions-by-sha, gha-no-curl-pipe-bash, gha-no-untrusted-script-injection.
